name: gopeed-extension-fuckingfast
author: Tonikkl
title: FuckingFast
description: Resolve FuckingFast file pages to direct downloads.

settings.name: cookie
settings.title: Cookie
settings.description: Optional fuckingfast.co cookie for pages that require a browser session.

settings.name: userAgent
settings.title: User-Agent
settings.description: Optional browser User-Agent to use while resolving pages.
settings.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
